rationale: Only real difference vs Option B is the timestamp field; reusing deferred_date avoids adding a third _at/_date variant (existing closed_at vs deferred_date drift). deferred_by discriminates enum code from prose. Fewer new keys, reuses show.py render. Scored 10/12 vs 9/12.
rule: Option A (reuse existing keys): add deferred_by, reuse deferred_reason for the enum code and deferred_date for the timestamp
alternatives_rejected: Option B (distinct machine keys: new deferred_reason enum + deferred_at) — reproduces _at/_date naming drift, requires ~4 extra show.py sites, name-collides deferred_reason
